scripts.build:deploy: vite build && mkdir -p dist/hyperaion dist/hyperaion/lp && cp dist/index.html dist/hyperaion/index.html && printf '%s' 'HyperAION' > dist/hyperaion/lp/index.html
scripts.leads: npx wrangler d1 execute hyperaion-leads --remote --command "SELECT created_at, name, email, company, purpose, timing, message FROM leads ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;"
